visual: Steps into a bow stance while one hand sweeps across the forward knee and the opposite hand pushes forward at shoulder height, alternating sides.
motion_description: From a stance balancing on the back right leg with the left knee elevated, the left foot steps directly forward. As weight steadily transfers onto the front leg to form a bow stance, the left arm sweeps downward in a semi-circular arc past the left knee, finishing near the hip. Simultaneously, the right hand pushes straight outward from ear level to shoulder height, with the torso rotating squarely to the front in a slow, continuous flow.
